populate(FacultyDTO, UserContext) - Method in class com.rays.dao.impl.FacultyDAOImpl
Populates the faculty DTO with college, course, and subject names based on their respective IDs.
populate(MarksheetDTO, UserContext) - Method in class com.rays.dao.impl.MarksheetDAOImpl
Populates the marksheet DTO with student name based on student ID.
populate(StudentDTO, UserContext) - Method in class com.rays.dao.impl.StudentDAOImpl
Populates the student DTO with college name based on college ID.
populate(SubjectDTO, UserContext) - Method in class com.rays.dao.impl.SubjectDAOImpl
Populates the subject DTO with course name based on course ID.
populate(TimetableDTO, UserContext) - Method in class com.rays.dao.impl.TimetableDAOImpl
Populates the timetable DTO with subject and course names based on their respective IDs.
populate(UserDTO, UserContext) - Method in class com.rays.dao.impl.UserDAOImpl
Populates the user DTO with role name and preserves existing last login and image ID information.
populate(T, UserContext) - Method in class com.rays.common.impl.BaseDAOImpl
Populates additional fields in the DTO before persistence.
preload() - Method in class com.rays.ctl.FacultyCtl
Preloads dropdown lists required for Faculty forms.
preload() - Method in class com.rays.ctl.MarksheetCtl
Preloads student list for dropdown in marksheet forms.
preload() - Method in class com.rays.ctl.RoleCtl
Preloads role list for dropdown in forms.
preload() - Method in class com.rays.ctl.StudentCtl
Preloads college list for dropdown in student forms.
preload() - Method in class com.rays.ctl.SubjectCtl
Preloads course list for dropdown in subject forms.
preload() - Method in class com.rays.ctl.TimetableCtl
Preloads course and subject lists for dropdown in timetable forms.
preload() - Method in class com.rays.ctl.UserCtl
Preloads role list for dropdown in user forms.
